content.en:
Fifteenth dimension.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and condensed multiple copy bodies, just for fear that the copy body would fall, and he would have to come back in, so it would be troublesome.

Therefore, he left behind multiple replica bodies, scattered everywhere, and it was impossible for them all to fall instantly, so that the seeds were retained, and the replica bodies could continue to condense in the future.

Ye Tian already knew the location of the Fog-Eyed Star, so he only needed to hurry to the Fog-Eyed Star.

However, the journey is dangerous.

Because this is the fifteenth dimension, it is common to encounter the multi-dimensional life of the eighth realm here, but some of the multi-dimensional lives of the eighth realm are very powerful, even the Chiyang Sect does not dare to explore the entire fifteenth dimension, and only dares to occupy a small area, otherwise there will not be enough manpower to guard it.

In the fifteenth dimension, the extradimensional realm of the eighth realm often has the occurrence of being killed and killed.

Ye Tian's current strength was indeed comparable to the average Eighth Realm, but there were too many Eighth Realm multi-dimensional beings that could kill him.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a very terrifying Eighth Realm Multidimensional Life 10, and the other party just glanced at him, his body was petrified and shattered, and the Dacheng-level Primal Domain Body couldn't bear it.

After that, another copy of his body circumnavigated the area and continued on its way.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai came to the Fog-Eyed Star, and because of this, three replica bodies fell.

It can be seen from this that where does the ordinary eighth realm dare to cross the fifteenth dimension, unless the location that comes in happens to be near the fog-eyed star.

The Fog-Eyed Star is huge, and even from a long distance, you can feel the oppression it brings.

According to what the Purple Yun Realm Lord said, the Fog-Eyed Star was originally an ordinary star in the sixteenth dimension, but even if it was an ordinary star, it was an unimaginably huge star for the seventh realm and even the eighth realm.

What extradimensional realm, compared to this fog-eyed star, is just a small bubble.

Even many of the smaller extradimensional realms are about the same size as this fog-eyed star.

The closer he got to this fog-eyed star, the more pressure Ye Tian was under, and his speed of action would become very slow, and he would not be able to break the dimensional void here.

Before approaching the fog-eyed star, it seemed to be a foggy patch, and after approaching, this fog-eyed star could be seen clearly.

There were countless blood-red eyes on it, and it seemed that countless eyes were staring at him, but he knew that this was not a real eye, but a passage into the Mist-Eyed Star, but it looked like an eye on the outside, which gave him the name Mist-Eyed Star.

"According to what the Purple Yun Realm Lord said, with my strength, entering the interior of the Fog Eye Star will definitely die, and it is almost impossible to reach that position. However, I hid my strength in front of the Purple Yun Realm Lord, and she didn't know my true strength, maybe I still had hope of entering that place inside the Misty Eyes Star. "

Swish!

Ye Tian flew over, came to a passage of the Misty Eye Star, and then walked in.

At this time, he felt an incomparably terrifying oppressive force, as if his body was about to be torn apart.

"It's a fog-eyed star!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he continued on his way, but slowly, and it would take him a long time to get there, and if he fell in between, he would have to start all over again.

Thereupon.

He condensed several replica bodies and advanced one by one, if the one in front fell, at least the back was prepared.

In this way, Ye Tian kept advancing, and after advancing for a distance, he finally encountered real danger.

A crimson shadow appeared, bursting with strange pupils from its body.

"The Spirit of the Mist Shadow has finally appeared!"

This Shadow Spirit can only appear inside the Shadow of Mist, unable to leave, and if you forcibly take them away, they will dissipate immediately.

And this spirit of fog and shadow is very powerful, but how powerful it is, Ye Tian is not very clear, but he will know it soon.

"Primordial Domain!"

"The Primordial Phase!"

"Primal Sword Domain!"

Ye Tian's dimensional rules also broke out, showing all his combat power.

Bang!!!!

The two sides fought each other.

And the strength of this Fog Shadow Spirit was really too strong, and with a single blow, it shattered Ye Tian's Primal Law Aspect and Primordial Domain Body.

And Ye Tian's Primal Sword Domain couldn't hurt the other party.

After a few breaths, Ye Tian was already severely injured, and then he couldn't even escape, and was directly killed.

"The Spirit of Mist Shadow is too powerful, with my current strength, it is not an opponent at all, even if multiple copy bodies shoot together, it is useless!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The second dimensional domain body given to him by the Purple Yun Realm Lord is called the Phantom Domain Body, once it is practiced, the speed will be extremely fast, and it also has a domain body secret technique-Phantom Aurora, which is the real extreme speed.

So.

If Ye Tian cultivates into a phantom domain body, his strength will increase a lot.

So in the following days, Ye Tian cultivated the Phantom Domain Body while breaking through the Fog Shadow Star.

The Phantom Domain also needs to absorb the breath of a Phantom Star in the sixteenth dimension before it can be cultivated.

Time flies.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had successfully cultivated into the Phantom Domain Body, and his physical fitness had skyrocketed, and his strength was much stronger.

this day.

Ye Tian encountered a misty shadow spirit again, and Xuan 083 fought against it.

With the help of the two dimensional domains, Ye Tian was able to fight with the other party this time and only fell into disadvantage, and then the two copy bodies shot together, which suppressed the other party.

But.

Ye Tian also knew that he couldn't kill this Mist Shadow Spirit, so he let the other copy bodies continue to move forward, thus going deep into the internal area of the Mist Shadow Star.

However.

After going deep into the Fog Shadow Star, he realized that his current strength was still not enough, and there were still Fog Shadow Spirits that could buy and kill him in seconds.

So.

Ye Tian could only rely on luck to approach that place step by step.

This requires multiple replica bodies to be tested again and again, even if they fall many times.

In this way, hundreds of domain yuan years passed unconsciously.

It takes so many years to explore just one astral body, and it is impossible to succeed in exploring it in other Eighth Realms.

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body finally came to a large space, where there was a strange red boulder.

"Misty Shadow Red Stone!"

This Fog Shadow Red Stone contains special energy, and cultivating the Fog Eye Soul Technique requires absorbing this special energy before it can be truly practiced.

Fortunately, there is no Fog Shadow Spirit here, and he can cultivate here with confidence.
